slides.headline: Automate Certifications, Track Compliance, Support Student Veterans
slides.body: VASCO Assistant Pro streamlines VA School Certifying Official duties.

slides.headline: Automate Certifications
slides.body: Ensure timely and accurate Chapter 33 certifications for student veterans.

slides.headline: Track Compliance
slides.body: Easily monitor student veteran compliance with VA regulations.

slides.headline: Support Student Veterans
slides.body: Empower VASCOs with tools to support student veterans during certification.

slides.headline: ComplianceMatters
slides.body: Stay ahead of changes in VA education benefits.

slides.headline: YellowRibbon
slides.body: Comprehensive support for student veterans through the Yellow Ribbon Program.
Join the waitlist for VASCO Assistant Pro. Link in bio.
slides.headline: Read the full post

outline.caption: VASCO Assistant Pro automates certifications, tracks compliance, and supports student veterans. Catch at-risk veterans early with proactive systems. Join the waitlist for pre-launch pricing.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 5, which could benefit from a more compelling headline to better align with the narrative arc.
